/Volumes/programming_folders/redia_proje.serviceRawFile:
service: po

provider:
  name: aws
  versionFunctions: false
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: me-south-1
  profile: alrida-company
  memorySize: 3008
  timeout: 300  # Adjusted to 29 seconds to comply with API Gateway limits
  apiGateway:
    binaryMediaTypes:
      - '*/*'
  httpApi:
    cors: true

custom:
  esbuild:
    external:
      - sharp
  packagerOptions:
    scripts:
      - npm install --arch=x64 --platform=linux sharp

functions:
  main:
    handler: index.handler
    environment:
